title: Stop Losing to Selling Digital Downloads in Pakistan — Here Is the Real Fix
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: In Pakistan, thousands of digital creators struggle to sell their ebooks, courses, and software due to banking limitations and geographic restrictions. Every day, they watch as potential buyers vanish due to the inability to process payments. This is not just a problem in Pakistan, but in many countries including Ghana, Nigeria, Kenya, and others. The consequences are real: lost sales, wasted time, and a damaged reputation. The good news is that there is a real fix.
The Real Reason This Problem Exists

The primary reason digital creators in Pakistan can't sell their products is that they can't process payments through PayPal, Stripe, or other popular platforms. This is due to strict Know-Your-Customer (KYC) requirements and geographic restrictions that block payments to specific countries. As a result, creators are forced to rely on expensive and unreliable payment solutions or abandon their businesses altogether. The lack of infrastructure and support for digital commerce in countries like Pakistan exacerbates the problem, leaving creators in a difficult situation.
Why the Obvious Fixes Do Not Work

Many digital creators try to circumvent payment restrictions by using workarounds like cryptocurrencies, but this often leads to more problems than solutions. Some may resort to using expensive and complicated payment gateways that promise to solve the issue but ultimately fail to deliver. Others may be forced to abandon their businesses and focus on other income streams. In Pakistan, the lack of a reliable payment infrastructure means that even the most innovative workarounds can't overcome the fundamental challenges of processing payments.
The Infrastructure That Solves It

The solution to this problem is a blockchain-based payment infrastructure that allows digital creators to process payments directly without relying on traditional payment processors. Unchained Commerce offers a range of products, including the Web3 Wallet Connect, which enables creators to integrate wallet connectivity directly into their websites. This means that buyers can make payments directly to the creator's wallet, eliminating the need for intermediaries and ensuring that payments are processed quickly and reliably.
Blockchain payments can eliminate the need for intermediaries and ensure that payments are processed quickly and reliably.
How to Implement the Solution Today

Implementing a blockchain-based payment infrastructure requires a few simple steps. First, creators need to sign up for an Unchained Commerce account and purchase the Web3 Wallet Connect product. Once installed, they can start accepting payments directly from their website. Buyers can then make payments using their preferred cryptocurrency, eliminating the need for intermediaries and ensuring that payments are processed quickly and reliably. By following these steps, digital creators in Pakistan can start selling their products and connecting with buyers around the world.
What Success Looks Like After the Fix

After implementing a blockchain-based payment infrastructure, digital creators in Pakistan can expect to see a significant increase in sales and revenue. They can connect with buyers from around the world, eliminating the geographic restrictions that previously held them back. By using the Web3 Wallet Connect product, creators can ensure that payments are processed quickly and reliably, reducing the risk of lost sales and increasing their overall revenue. With a reliable payment infrastructure in place, digital creators can focus on what they do best: creating high-quality products and connecting with their audience.
